zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Maltravers於1378年出生在英國英格蘭多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯時，她的父親John VII Maltravers28歲，母親Elizabeth d'Aumarle34歲。她於1397年10月之前與Sir Humphrey Stafford II在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1422年在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿波次波利享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿波次波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Maltravers于1378年出生在英国英格兰多瑟特萊謝特 馬特拉維斯时，她的父亲John VII Maltravers28岁，母亲Elizabeth d'Aumarle34岁。她于1397年10月之前与Sir Humphrey Stafford II在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1422年在英国英格兰多瑟特阿波次波利享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特阿波次波利。

nameMeanings.name: Maltravers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Maltravers was born in 1378, in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John VII Maltravers, was 28 and her mother, Elizabeth d'Aumarle, was 34. She married Sir Humphrey Stafford II before October 1397, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1422, in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Maltravers est née en 1378, à Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John VII Maltravers, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth d'Aumarle, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Humphrey Stafford II avant octobre 1397, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1422, à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Maltravers 1378 in Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John VII Maltravers 28 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth d'Aumarle 34. Sie hat vor Oktober 1397 in England Sir Humphrey Stafford II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1422 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Maltravers è nata il nel 1378 nel Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John VII Maltravers, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth d'Aumarle, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir Humphrey Stafford II prima del ottobre 1397, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1422, nel Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Maltraversが1378年にイギリスイギリスドールセトリトチェット マトラバーズで生まれた時，父John VII Maltraversは28歳，母Elizabeth d'Aumarleは34歳であった。1397年10月以前にイギリスでSir Humphrey Stafford IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1422年にイギリスイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Maltravers(이)가 1378년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 리트쳇 마트레이버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John VII Maltravers(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth d'Aumarle(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1397년 10월 이전 영국에서 Sir Humphrey Stafford II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 애벗스버이에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 애벗스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Maltravers nasceu em 1378, em Lytchett Matravers, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John VII Maltravers, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth d'Aumarle, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Humphrey Stafford II antes outubro de 1397, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1422, em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Maltravers родилась в 1378 г. в местности личетт матравирс, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John VII Maltravers было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth d'Aumarle, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey Stafford II перед октябрь 1397 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1422 г. в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Murió en 1422, en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Abbotsbury, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
